title: End-to-End Balance-Guided Oblique Trees on 5 Real Benchmarks
summary: Demo notebook for the Balance-Guided Oblique Trees experiment. Compares three FIGS tree methods (axis-aligned, random oblique, signed-spectral) on synthetic electricity data (80 examples, 7 features, binary classification). Demonstrates the full pipeline: Co-Information matrix computation, SPONGE signed spectral clustering for feature module discovery, oblique FIGS training, and evaluation with accuracy/interpretability metrics visualization.
